title: Server Infrastructure Updates

content:
It's my second month in college. It's pretty cool so far. Server is running, I switched to Purelymail for my emails, and I've met a lot of cool people.

EDIT: Speaking of email, I also updated my GPG key. /EDIT

Rsync.net backups are still running, storage looks good.

The only real issue is that the ethernet in my dorm building is very very volatile. Occasionally there is a lot of load and my speeds drop down to ~1Mbps. Unfortunate.

Anyway, everything is cool here. See you all in the next post (which should be soon...).
